_publications._publicationTitle: Feasibility of magnetic resonance-guided high-intensity focused ultrasound treatment targeting distinct nodular lesions in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Based on prior experience, a maximum treatment volume of 120cc per treatment would be feasible. The ablation duration is <20 s, followed by an approximate cooling period of 3 minutes
resourceName: Profound Sonalleve V2 (Profound Medical Inc., Mississauga, Ontario, Canada)
details: Maximum treatment volume of 120cc per treatment would be feasible, with ablation duration <20 seconds followed by approximately 3 minutes cooling period
